_source: Dune tokens_solana.transfers × tokens_solana.nft, pythians collection, measured 2026-07-05 (T-2)
_reading: outer_executing_account cleanly separates marketplace custody legs from plain pNFT transfers. Candy Guard mint count (3,683) equals the member count — cross-confirmation of the member set. Precision vs Helius sale/list/delist labels still requires the DB fixture join (runbook step 5.3) — this distribution is the program-ID MAP evidence, not the precision measurement.
decision: batch-1 ships kinds mint/transfer/burn only (option c — coarse, never wrong); option (a) program-ID marketplace classification is well-evidenced by this map and gets its precision measurement vs Helius-classified labels at runbook step 5.3 before any SVM_EMIT_MARKETPLACE_KINDS flip
